title: polyscias thailandica
intro: Polyscias thailandica, also known as Thai Polyscias or Thai Hedge Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polyscias thailandica are said to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, its leaves are used in topical applications to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
